summaries.summary: Kosovo eid is the national system that manages electronic identities for citizens of kosovo. Citizens can get their electronic id by going through a enrollment process at the civil registration offices ( ) counters. In a similar way, citizens can obtain an electronic seal through the enrollment process.
Getting eid involves passing the enrollment process at arc (for the electronic id) or at arbk ( for the digital seal).
The self service portal can be used to manage the life cycle of the certificate. The certificate can also be managed by the user via the website.
Kosovo wallet is a mobile app used to safely keep the credentials of the electronic id or electronic seal. It is available for iOS and Android devices.

The eid API is available for third-party integrators who want to add kosovo eid features into their own systems. Any software — web, mobile, or backend — that has a permanent internet connection can connect to the eidapi.
The desktop and mobile signing apps are used to allow using the electronic id for signing and stamping documents. The apps are available on iOS and Android.

Strong authentication is a very useful and powerful feature provided by eid. This feature will allow your users to .
